title: stellaria palustris subsp. fennica
intro: Stellaria palustris subsp. fennica, also known as the marsh starwort, is a subspecies of the Stellaria palustris plant that is native to Finland and is typically found in wetlands and marshy areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stellaria palustris subsp. fennica include its ability to help reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
